CR = Corrections and Reversals — this group code should be used for correcting a prior claim. It 
applies when there is a change to a previously adjudicated claim. 
OA = Other Adjustments — this group code should be used when no other group code applies to the 
adjustment. 
PI = Payer Initiated Reductions — this group code should be used when, in the opinion of the payer, 
the adjustment is not the responsibility of the patient,
